title: Australian Christmas Pudding
description: A traditional Australian Christmas dessert, rich in flavors and textures. Perfect for the holiday season.
instructions: Cut the Christmas pudding into cubes.
In a bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, and butter until well combined.
Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the cubed Christmas pudding and mix until just combined.
Spoon the mixture into a greased 20cm (8-inch) round cake pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with your choice of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
